attempts.strategy: Build the topological finite-cover front: G := {r | exists i, basicOpen r <= q.X i}; show span G = top via iSup_basicOpen_eq_top + Opens.mem_iSup, covering each point via q.coversTop + Sieve.mem_ofObjects_iff + basic-open basis; then Ideal.span_eq_top_iff_finite extracts finite t
attempts.code_tried: obtain ⟨U, f, hf, hxU⟩ := q.coversTop ⊤ x (by trivial); rw [Sieve.mem_ofObjects_iff] at hf; obtain ⟨i, ⟨hUi⟩⟩ := hf; have hxXi := (leOfHom hUi) hxU; obtain ⟨V, ⟨r, rfl⟩, hxV, hVle⟩ := (Opens.isBasis_iff_nbhd.mp PrimeSpectrum.isBasis_basic_opens) hxXi; exact ⟨r, ⟨i, hVle⟩, hxV⟩
attempts.insight: Axiom-clean (propext/Classical.choice/Quot.sound). The point-cover step needed leOfHom to extract U <= q.X i from the sieve morphism; isBasis_iff_nbhd produces a basic open D(r) with x in D(r) <= q.X i.

attempts.insight: The existential's QuasicoherentData index universe is independent of the instance's auto-bound universe; explicit universe naming friction not worth it. DROPPED the corollary; downstream callers do the 2-line obtain (h.nonempty_quasicoherentData.some) where universes unify.
